THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALKIN, AMOS L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LITTLEWOOD, MICHAEL $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $72.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,572.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LITTLEWOOD, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MALKIN, AMOS L. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
EXHIBITS ORDERED DESTROYED
